entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `amount_cents` INTEGER NOT NULL, `recorded_at` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `image_url` TEXT NOT NULL, `breed_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `breed_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `origin` TEXT NOT NULL, `temperament` TEXT NOT NULL, `life_span` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`breed_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `origin` TEXT NOT NULL, `temperament` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`cats`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_cats_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `cats` BEGIN DELETE FROM `cats_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_cats_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `cats` BEGIN DELETE FROM `cats_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_cats_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `cats` BEGIN INSERT INTO `cats_fts`(`docid`, `breed_name`, `origin`, `temperament`, `description`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`breed_name`, NEW.`origin`, NEW.`temperament`, NEW.`description`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_cats_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `cats` BEGIN INSERT INTO `cats_fts`(`docid`, `breed_name`, `origin`, `temperament`, `description`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`breed_name`, NEW.`origin`, NEW.`temperament`, NEW.`description`); END

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `country` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`name` TEXT NOT NULL, `country` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`manufacturers`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_manufacturers_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `manufacturers` BEGIN DELETE FROM `manufacturers_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_manufacturers_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `manufacturers` BEGIN DELETE FROM `manufacturers_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_manufacturers_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `manufacturers` BEGIN INSERT INTO `manufacturers_fts`(`docid`, `name`, `country`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`name`, NEW.`country`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_manufacturers_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `manufacturers` BEGIN INSERT INTO `manufacturers_fts`(`docid`, `name`, `country`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`name`, NEW.`country`); END
